title: I Set Up a Claude Code Operating System for 6 Founders in 8 Hours
summary: Liam Ottley demonstrates setting up Claude Code as an AI Operating System for six non-technical founders in a single day. The setup includes a Context OS with four context files teaching Claude about business operations, enabling non-coders to build automation for invoicing, finance reporting, competitor analysis, and content workflows.
